# National Testing Network

> Pre-employment testing for public safety careers. Candidates take one
> nationally validated exam (in person at 100+ testing centers or proctored
> virtually) and send scores to any participating fire, law enforcement,
> 911 dispatch, corrections, EMS, or transit department in the United States.

## Key facts

- Founded 2006 in Lynnwood, WA; the test-administration arm of Ergometrics & Applied Personnel Research, Inc.
- Exams: FireTEAM (fire, $55), FrontLine National (law enforcement, $55), ECOMM National (911 dispatch, $55), REACT (corrections, $41), MedicTEAM (EMS, $80), CPAT (firefighter physical, $125).
- Base fee includes score delivery to one department; each additional department is $12.
- Scores are typically valid for 12 months; retakes allowed after 90 days.
- Virtual proctored testing is available for all written exams.
- Fee waivers are available for candidates with financial need.

## Pages

- /jobs : open public safety recruitments accepting NTN scores
- /tests : the exam catalog with sections, duration, and pricing
- /pricing : full fee schedule and cost estimator
- /departments : information for hiring agencies
- /faq : scheduling, scoring, transfers, and retake policy
